name: Religious Exemption from Social Security Taxes

eligibility.description: Both the employer (including all partners in a partnership) and the employee must be members of a recognized religious sect (per section 1402(g)(1)) and must file and receive approval for an application for exemption.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a full exemption from both the employer and employee portions of FICA taxes (Social Security and Medicare) when both parties belong to a recognized religious sect opposed to public insurance benefits.
